risks.name: EtcdStorageVersion3Migration
risks.message: Updating from etcd 3.5.25 or older to 3.6 without passing through 4.5.26 or later can cause the 3.6 etcd to attempt to contact old, non-existent members tracked in v2 storage.

risks.name: PrecisionTimeProtocolDPLLPins
risks.message: Clusters using older PTP operators may struggle to synchronize system clocks and might not provide time to downstream clients.

promql.promql:
group by (_id, name) (csv_succeeded{_id="", name=~"ptp-operator[.]v4[.][0-9]*[.]0-(202[3-5]|20260[1-9])[0-9]*"})
or on (_id)
0 * label_replace(group by (_id) (csv_succeeded{_id=""}), "name", "ptp-operator.v4.y.0-20260331... or older not installed", "", "")

risks.name: PrecisionTimeProtocolDPLLPins
risks.message: Clusters using older PTP operators may struggle to synchronize system clocks and might not provide time to downstream clients.

promql.promql:
group by (_id, name) (csv_succeeded{_id="", name=~"ptp-operator[.]v4[.][0-9]*[.]0-(202[3-5]|20260[1-9])[0-9]*"})
or on (_id)
0 * label_replace(group by (_id) (csv_succeeded{_id=""}), "name", "ptp-operator.v4.y.0-20260331... or older not installed", "", "")

risks.name: ControlPlaneStatusGreyIcon
risks.message: Control plane status indicator remains grey and never shows green, even when cluster operators are healthy.

promql.promql:
0 * group by (invoker) (cluster_installer{_id="",invoker="hypershift"})
or on ()
group by (invoker) (cluster_installer{_id=""})

risks.name: EtcdStorageVersion3Migration
risks.message: Updating from etcd 3.5.25 or older to 3.6 without passing through 4.5.26 or later can cause the 3.6 etcd to attempt to contact old, non-existent members tracked in v2 storage.

risks.name: ShortNameImageReferences
risks.message: 4.21 will no longer accept short name image references (with no domain specified), and updating might break any workload Pods that depend on those references.

risks.name: SigstoreSignatureMirroring
risks.message: 4.21 will require Sigstore signatures on quay.io/openshift-release-dev/ocp-release to be present on any mirrors configured for that repository.

promql.promql:
topk(1, group by (_id, resource) (max_over_time(apiserver_storage_objects{_id="",resource=~"imagedigestmirrorsets[.]config[.]openshift[.]io|imagecontentsourcepolicies[.]operator[.]openshift[.]io"}[1h]) > 0))
or on (_id)
0 * group by (_id) (max_over_time(apiserver_storage_objects{_id=""}[1h]))

risks.name: RuncShareProcessNamespace
risks.message: Some runc 1.2 releases fail to launch containers in some Pods where shareProcessNamespace is explicitly set true.

risks.name: PreRelease
risks.message: This is a pre-release version, and you should update to a release version instead. If it is a minor update, it is suggested to upgrade to the latest patch version first.
